top_signals.title: Solstice CEO defends its $14.5B acquisition after the stock plunges 15%
top_signals.summary: Solstice CEO David Sewell said the company's acquisition of Element Solutions creates a "world-leading" supplier of advanced materials.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Op-Ed: Molybdenum and the geopolitics of substitution
top_signals.summary: Molybdenum's price surge underscores critical mineral supply stress, tungsten risks, and rising strategic value in defense alloys.
